scripts.lint: uv run --all-extras ruff check src/ tests/
scripts.format: uv run --all-extras ruff format src/ tests/
scripts.format:check: uv run --all-extras ruff format --check src/ tests/
scripts.test: uv run --all-extras python -m pytest tests/unit/ tests/integration/ tests/e2e/ -q --basetemp ../.pytest-tmp-kicad-mcp-pro-full --cov=kicad_mcp --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml --cov-fail-under=90
scripts.package:check: uv build && uv run --all-extras python scripts/check_package_metadata.py
scripts.security:bandit: uv run --all-extras python -m bandit -r src/ -ll -s B104
scripts.security: corepack pnpm run security:bandit && corepack pnpm run security:audit
scripts.check: corepack pnpm run metadata:check && corepack pnpm run assets:icons:check && corepack pnpm run mcp:manifest:check && corepack pnpm run docker:metadata:check && corepack pnpm run release:check && corepack pnpm run submission:check && corepack pnpm run docs:tools:check && corepack pnpm run compat:check && corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run security && corepack pnpm run workflows:lint && corepack pnpm run workflows:security && corepack pnpm run release:dry-run && corepack pnpm run build
scripts.check:ci: corepack pnpm run metadata:check && corepack pnpm run assets:icons:check && corepack pnpm run mcp:manifest:check && corepack pnpm run docker:metadata:check && corepack pnpm run release:check && corepack pnpm run submission:check && corepack pnpm run docs:tools:check && corepack pnpm run compat:check && corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run security && corepack pnpm run workflows:lint && corepack pnpm run workflows:security && corepack pnpm run release:dry-run && corepack pnpm run build
scripts.hooks:pre-commit: uv run --all-extras python scripts/hook_pre_commit.py && corepack pnpm run metadata:check
scripts.hooks:pre-push: corepack pnpm run metadata:check && corepack pnpm run release:check && corepack pnpm run compat:check && corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test:unit && corepack pnpm run workflows:lint
scripts.release:dry-run: corepack pnpm run metadata:check && corepack pnpm run release:check
